symbols: soaring vertical forms — the upward aspiration of Gothic architecture toward the divine
blue tones suggesting stained glass — sacred light filtering into the cathedral space
red at the base — the earth, the blood, the human grounding of sacred space
intersecting geometric planes — the complex structure of faith and architecture
description: An abstract painting composed almost entirely of vertical and diagonal geometric forms in deep blues, blacks, browns, and whites. The upper two-thirds is dominated by tall rectangular shapes in varying shades of blue, suggestive of soaring Gothic columns and stained glass windows. Small touches of red appear amid the blue forms. The lower portion transitions to deep reds and browns, creating a ground or floor. The overall effect strongly evokes the interior of a Gothic cathedral — towering, dark, and shot through with colored light.
